faqs.question: What are the most common pantry pests in Far Rockaway homes?
faqs.answer: Indian meal moths, cigarette beetles, flour beetles, and grain weevils are the most common pantry pests we encounter in Far Rockaway. These insects infest dry goods like cereals, flour, pasta, rice, dried fruits, and spices, contaminating food and reproducing rapidly if not addressed promptly.
